message:
feat(net): add HTTP router, middleware, sessions, and security infrastructure

HTTP Framework (include/asx/net/http.h):
- Route dispatch with path parameter extraction and typed handlers
- Session management with configurable policies and cookie binding
- Security policies for authentication and authorization gates
- Middleware chaining with short-circuit support for request/response
- Multipart form parsing for file upload handling
- Static file serving with MIME type detection
- Server-Sent Events (SSE) support for streaming responses

Tests:
- Add 100+ tests covering path params, cookies, middleware short-circuit,
  security policies, sessions, static file serving, SSE, and multipart

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
